title: C919 E-TRAS — over-temp fault preempts deploy mid-cycle (→ SF)
description: Nominal deploy starts. At t=2.5s — partway through the deploy chain — etras_over_temp_fault:stuck_on injects via the A/C bus. The safety_interlock_manager preempts the state machine to SF_ABORT_OR_FAULT regardless of where in the cycle it was. Verifies the SF preemption hook for over-temp (mirrors the existing tr_inhibited fixture for the other SF trigger).

events.note: ETRAS controller over-temp — SF preempts immediately on next tick
SF preempts on over_temp regardless of where in the deploy cycle
CMD3 latch resets on tr_command3_enable=False (over_temp clamps it)
